reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos cuando vamos camino a Buenos Aires. Tienen un área verde muy linda, buena atención en la Estación y los baños siempre impecables.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop when we're on the way to Buenos Aires. They have a lovely green area, good service at the station, and the bathrooms are always spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJM2RfX3VnRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Asociación Judicial Bonaerense Mar del Plata

reviews.comment:
parada obligada en la ruta 2. justo a la mitad del trayecto. precios caros. a ver si los dueños se dan cuenta que para vender late de vainilla tienen que tener la vainilla. siempre hay de avellana intomable.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on Route 2. Right in the middle of the route. Expensive prices. I hope the owners realize that to sell vanilla latte, they have to have vanilla. There's always undrinkable hazelnut.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeGZtUWJnEAE
